hooks.command: if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] && ([ -f package.json ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f go.mod ] || [ -f Cargo.toml ] || [ -f pom.xml ]); then echo 'Tip: This project has no AI dev setup. Run /scaffold to generate CLAUDE.md, agents, skills, rules, and MCP configs tailored to this codebase.' >&2; fi; exit 0
